summary: Comprehensive testing of GRS ERP System feature enhancements completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend client management fully functional with all required fields. Job and stone dialog accessibility needs minor fixes for overlay interception.

data_limitations.issue: Insufficient test data - jobs only contain 1 stone each

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts pointer events preventing stone selection

design_issues.issue: Modal overlays prevent proper interaction with stone rows in job dialog

passed_tests: Clients page - Edit button visible on each row
Clients page - Edit dialog opens with all fields (name, email, phone, company, address, branch, notes)
Clients page - Create new client dialog with notes field
Jobs page navigation and job list display
Jobs page - Click on job #2 opens job dialog
Job dialog - Displays job details and stones table
Backend API - All 8 core endpoints working (100% success)
Backend API - Client update with notes field
Backend API - Stone verbal findings structured format
Backend API - Dropdown settings initialization (111 options)

medium_priority: Fix stone dialog overlay interception in job details - stones should be clickable to open stone dialog
Test and verify certificate ID mandatory validation in stone verbal findings
Add more test data (multi-stone jobs) to properly test grouping/ungrouping functionality
low_priority: Verify group header row hover effects don't cause blinking (needs grouped stones to test)
